name: Regis Healthcare Limited
analysis: REG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 30% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$6.5100, stop A$5.8509, target A$8.4873 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
